simple_types.name: sfEventType
simple_types.code:
type sfEventType is
  (sfEvtClosed,
   sfEvtResized,
   sfEvtLostFocus,
   sfEvtGainedFocus,
   sfEvtTextEntered,
   sfEvtKeyPressed,
   sfEvtKeyReleased,
   sfEvtMouseWheelMoved,
   …,
   sfEvtCount
  );

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtClosed
enumeration_literals.description: /< The window requested to be closed (no data)

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtResized
enumeration_literals.description: /< The window was resized (data in event.size)

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtLostFocus
enumeration_literals.description: /< The window lost the focus (no data)

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtGainedFocus
enumeration_literals.description: /< The window gained the focus (no data)

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtTextEntered
enumeration_literals.description: /< A character was entered (data in event.text)

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtKeyPressed
enumeration_literals.description: /< A key was pressed (data in event.key)

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtKeyReleased
enumeration_literals.description: /< A key was released (data in event.key)

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtMouseWheelMoved
enumeration_literals.description: /< The mouse wheel was scrolled (data in event.mouseWheel) (deprecated)

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtMouseWheelScrolled
enumeration_literals.description: /< The mouse wheel was scrolled (data in event.mouseWheelScroll)

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtMouseButtonPressed
enumeration_literals.description: /< A mouse button was pressed (data in event.mouseButton)

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtMouseButtonReleased
enumeration_literals.description: /< A mouse button was released (data in event.mouseButton)

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtMouseMoved
enumeration_literals.description: /< The mouse cursor moved (data in event.mouseMove)

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtMouseEntered
enumeration_literals.description: /< The mouse cursor entered the area of the window (no data)

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtMouseLeft
enumeration_literals.description: /< The mouse cursor left the area of the window (no data)

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtJoystickButtonPressed
enumeration_literals.description: /< A joystick button was pressed (data in event.joystickButton)

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtJoystickButtonReleased
enumeration_literals.description: /< A joystick button was released (data in event.joystickButton)

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtJoystickMoved
enumeration_literals.description: /< The joystick moved along an axis (data in event.joystickMove)

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtJoystickConnected
enumeration_literals.description: /< A joystick was connected (data in event.joystickConnect)

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtJoystickDisconnected
enumeration_literals.description: /< A joystick was disconnected (data in event.joystickConnect)

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtTouchBegan
enumeration_literals.description: /< A touch event began (data in event.touch)

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtTouchMoved
enumeration_literals.description: /< A touch moved (data in event.touch)

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtTouchEnded
enumeration_literals.description: /< A touch event ended (data in event.touch)

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtSensorChanged
enumeration_literals.description: /< A sensor value changed (data in event.sensor)

enumeration_literals.name: sfEvtCount
enumeration_literals.description: /< Keep last -- the total number of event types

record_types.name: sfEvent
sfJoystickButtonEvent
sfJoystickConnectEvent
sfJoystickMoveEvent
sfKeyEvent
sfMouseButtonEvent
sfMouseMoveEvent
sfMouseWheelEvent
sfMouseWheelScrollEvent
sfSensorEvent
sfSizeEvent
sfTextEvent
sfTouchEvent
